features: [The Wallet Case Only for Google Pixel 8 5G]---NOT FITS Google Pixel 8 Pro.If you want to choose other styles of phone cases, click on the link next to the title to view their selection [Visit the HUOUH Store].

[Selected PU Leather & Full Protection]---This wallet case is Made from selected artificial leather, this wallet case offers quality, shock absorption, durability, and strength to protect the phone case for Google Pixel 8 5G.The flip phone case can provide protection for the 360 degrees, with shockproof, scratch-proof, and drop-proof functions.

[Large Capacity&Simplicity]---This wallet case can hold cash and multiple cards.It can also be used as a phone holder .Buttonless design enhances the multifunctional portability and minimalist aesthetics of the phone case.

[RFID Blocking Anti-Theft Swipe Function]---This leather wallet case is made to stop your card details from being stolen using special material that blocks RFID signals. Many Debit Cards, Credit Cards, and ID Cards have RFID chips, and scanners can grab card info within 10 feet (around 3 meters) without touching them. This case stops unauthorised scanning of your cards.

[Multiple Colors To Choice And Real Shoot]---All photos of phone case for Google Pixel 8 5G are taken in real life.,you can be confident that the information provided is accurate for making a purchase decision!
